cascade_form: Option E (sub-EXTERNAL-TABLE q8_uncertain_images): dase text-emb x image-caption-emb cos sim → drop sim<=TAU_LOW → BQ AI.IF on remaining; no tau_high (GT not top-1)

calibration.method: AI.GENERATE_BOOL on Q8 image+desc prompt + thinking_budget=0

baseline.sql:
WITH product_selection AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM fashion_product_images.STYLES_DETAILS styles_details
  WHERE true
    AND CHAR_LENGTH(styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value) >= 3000
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(
    ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(images.uri, '/')), '.')),
    '-',
    ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(images.uri, '/')), '.'))
  ) AS id
FROM product_selection as styles_details
JOIN EXTERNAL_OBJECT_TRANSFORM(TABLE `fashion_product_images.IMAGES`, ['SIGNED_URL']) as images
  ON AI.IF(
    ('The image ', images.ref, ' fits the description: ',
     styles_details.productDisplayName, ' ',
     styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )

cascade.method: Option E: dase 1×500 cos sim → drop sim<=tau_low → Stage1 EXTERNAL TABLE → Stage2 verbatim AI.IF

stage1_ctas.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE EXTERNAL TABLE fashion_product_images.q8_uncertain_images
    WITH CONNECTION `us.connection`
    OPTIONS(
      object_metadata = 'SIMPLE',
      uris = ['gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/53759.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/34835.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/46411.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/9259.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/36393.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/58743.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/10490.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/20008.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/41694.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/2479.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/36563.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/2048.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/46410.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/4728.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/40142.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/30292.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/22598.jpg', 'gs://<YOUR_GCP_PROJECT>-mmb-fashion-product-images-bucket/54188.jpg'

stage2_run.sql:
WITH product_selection AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM fashion_product_images.STYLES_DETAILS styles_details
  WHERE true
    AND CHAR_LENGTH(styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value) >= 3000
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(
    ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(images.uri, '/')), '.')),
    '-',
    ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(images.uri, '/')), '.'))
  ) AS id
FROM product_selection as styles_details
JOIN EXTERNAL_OBJECT_TRANSFORM(TABLE `fashion_product_images.q8_uncertain_images`, ['SIGNED_URL']) as images
  ON AI.IF(
    ('The image ', images.ref, ' fits the description: ',
     styles_details.productDisplayName, ' ',
     styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )
